issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as insufficient VRAM or missing GPU.
Pip install commands lack checksum verification, potentially exposing to malicious package tampering.

scenarios.name: QLoRA fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B for customer-support on a 12 GB GPU
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses BitsAndBytesConfig with load_in_4bit + nf4 + bnb_4bit_use_double_quant, LoraConfig r=16 alpha=32 targeting all 7 linear projections, and SFTTrainer with cosine scheduler + 3% warmup; baseline picks LoRA without 4-bit quant and targets only q_proj/v_proj.

scenarios.name: Merge a trained LoRA adapter and export weights for downstream inference
scenarios.rationale: Treatment loads PeftModel.from_pretrained on the base model, calls merge_and_unload, saves with save_pretrained, and copies the tokenizer; baseline saves the adapter separately and omits merge_and_unload or tokenizer copy.
